message.content:
{
  "analysis": "Now I have all components identified:
- Donor: Clover (5WJ2, ex=505nm) - use PDB FASTA, replace X→GYG, remove leading M
- Acceptor: mCherry (2H5Q, em=610nm) - use PDB FASTA, replace X→MYG, remove leading M
- Molecule binder: SNAP-tag (3KZY, binds O6-benzylguanine) - use PDB FASTA
- DHFR: from plasmid.gb, remove leading M
- Antibody binder: FLAG-tag (DYKDDDDK) - anti-FLAG M2 antibody target
- Order: FLAG - GS - Clover - GS - DHFR - GS - mCherry - GS - SNAP-tag",
  "plan": "Now I need to: 1) Construct the full protein sequence with GS linkers, 2) Codon-optimize the DNA to maintain 30-70% GC in every 50-nt window, 3) Write the gBlock file.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 << 'PYEOF'
import urllib.request
import json
import random
import string

# Define protein sequences
# FLAG-tag (antibody binder)
flag = "DYKDDDDK"

# Clover from PDB 5WJ2 - replace X with GYG, remove leading M
clover_pdb = "MGSSHHHHHHSSGENLYFQGHMVSKGEELFTGVVPILVELDGDVNGHKFSVRGEGEGDATNGKLTLKFICTTGKLPVPWPTLVTTFGYGVACFSRYPDHMKQHDFFKSAMPEGYVQERTISFKDDGTYKTRAEVKFEGDTLVNRIELKGIDFKEDGNILGHKLEYNFNSHNVYITADKQKNGIKANFKIRHNVEDGSVQLADHYQQNTPIGDGPVLLPDNHYLSHQSALSKDPNEKRDHMVLLEFVTAAGITHGMDELYK"
clover = clover_pdb[1:]  # Remove leading M

# DHFR from plasmid, remove M
dhfr = "ISLIAALAVDRVIGMENAMPWNLPADLAWFKRNTLNKPVIMGRHTWESIGRPLPGRKNIILSSQPGTDDRVTWVKSVDEAIAACGDVPEIMVIGGGRVYEQFLPKAQKLYLTHIDAEVEGDTHFPDYEPDDWESVFSEFHDADAQNSHSYCFEILERR"

# mCherry from PDB 2H5Q - replace X with MYG, remove leading M
mcherry_pdb = "MVSKGEEDNMAIIKEFMRFKVHMEGSVNGHEFEIEGEGEGRPYEGTQTAKLKVTKGGPLPFAWDILSPQFMYGSKAYVKHPADIPDYLKLSFPEGFKWERVMNFEDGGVVTVTQDSSLQDGEFIYKVKLRGTNFPSDGPVMQKKTMGWEASSERMYPEDGALKGEIKQRLKLKDGGHYDAEVKTTYKAKKPVQLPGAYNVNIKLDITSHNEDYTIVEQYERAEGRHSTGGMDELYK"
mcherry = mcherry_pdb[1:]  # Remove leading M

# SNAP-tag from PDB 3KZY (no M to remove)
snap = "GPGSDKDCEMKRTTLDSPLGKLELSGCEQGLHEIIFLGKGTSAADAVEVPAPAAVLGGPEPLMQATAWLNAYFHQPEAIEEFPVPALHHPVFQQESFTRQVLWKLLKVVKFGEVISYSHLAALAGNPAATAAVKTALSGNPVPILIPCHRVVQGDLDVGGYEGGLAVKEWLLAHEGHRLGKR"

# GS linkers (10 aa each)
gs = "GGSGGSGGSG"

# Full protein: FLAG - GS - Clover - GS - DHFR - GS - mCherry - GS - SNAP
full_protein = flag + gs + clover + gs + dhfr + gs + mcherry + gs + snap
print(f"Full protein length: {len(full_protein)} aa")
print(f"DNA length: {len(full_protein)*3} nt")
print(f"First 10 aa: {full_protein[:10]}")
print(f"Last 10 aa: {full_protein[-10:]}")

# Verify structure
assert full_protein[:8] == flag, "FLAG not at start"
assert full_protein[-182:] == snap, "SNAP not at end"

# Check donor-acceptor separation
# Clover ends, then GS, DHFR, GS, then mCherry starts
clover_end = len(flag) + len(gs) + len(clover)
mcherry_start = clover_end + len(gs) + len(dhfr) + len(gs)
# Between Clover and mCherry: GS + DHFR + GS
between = full_protein[clover_end:mcherry_start]
assert between == gs + dhfr + gs, "Donor-acceptor separation incorrect"
print(f"Between donor-acceptor: GS-linker + DHFR + GS-linker = {len(between)} aa")
print("All structural checks passed!")
PYEOF
",
      "duration": 5.0
    }
  ]
}
